title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
summary_full: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
summary_public: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
